headline: Formula One: Antonelli takes pole in Chinese GP qualifying ahead of Russell – as it happened
snippet: 2d ago 08.18 GMT But that’s about all that’s required from me. I’ll be back with you tomorrow to take you through all the action from the race, where the youngest pole sitter in F1 history will look t
full_text: 2d ago 08.18 GMT But that’s about all that’s required from me. I’ll be back with you tomorrow to take you through all the action from the race, where the youngest pole sitter in F1 history will look to go coast-to-coast. Be sure to check back in soon for Giles Richards’ full report. Share 2d ago 08.17 GMT Haha, Kimi’s father Marco Antonelli is on the broadcast. Positive but with a sting in the tail. “A bit lucky because George did only one push. But he did a good job.” Share 2d ago 08.13 GMT So it’ll be the Mercedes of Antonelli and Russell that will lock out the front row, followed by a second-row Ferrari lockout of Hamilton and Leclerc and a McLaren third-row papaya-out of Piastri and Norris. A strong quali in Shanghai! 💪 pic.twitter.com/Fc5uM0iPx0 — Scuderia Ferrari HP (@ScuderiaFerrari) March 14, 2026 Gasly in his Alpine moved up into P7, ahead of Verstappen, Hadjar, and Bearman.
